review_title: Seobility is a great starting place for SEO
description: We were looking for a basic plan to get clients of ours onto to show them the benefit of signing up for a SEO tool. About 50% of our clients signed up for the monthly contract. Without the free option this would not have been possible, and it is much better than some other products out there that don't allow you to test for free.
author: PAUL O.
pros: The free and premium plans are well priced for what you are getting. There are a lot of SaaS out there that promise the earth, Seobility delivers well.
cons: As with all SEO SaaS options, the prices are out of touch for the definite benefit that they provide. Start with the free account and then once you have played with the software, upgrade to get more of a benefit. This may not be the best platform for you, and you will know once you have tested it out.

review_title: A great service that provides all the things you expect of SEO analysis and a few things you don't
description: I've been pleasantly surprised by Seobility and it's capacity to surface actionable items on my site over time such as performance issues, as well as site structure & individual page content problems. All whilst giving easy to understand updates on where my pages are currently ranking in search engine results.
author: Stuart R.
pros: Ability to rescan your site when you decide it's important to, rather than waiting for your SEO tool to get to its scheduled scan is great to check site changes. Alerts for technical issues such as hosting and structural issues with site or page layout are critical for making sure your site remains in top shape.
cons: It can sometimes be awkward to locate and correct problems that are listed with site copy, however this is common to all SEO reporting tools. There are sometimes suggested changes that are not possible to make due to the platform / page designer / third party inclusions used on your website. It'd be great if these could be marked as "ignore" (particularly when they are replicated on multiple pages) & this "ignore list" could be reviewed periodically.

review_title: Inaccurate statistics generated
description: I cannot risk paying for a more upscale version of SEObility when the free version does not demonstrate that it can accurately check a page.
author: Andries O.
pros: It is a relatively good start and does some things well.
cons: Its statistics are inaccurate. Consistently tells me I have more than one <h1> tag, when I only have one. Tells me the heading 1 text is too short, so I increased it to 21. Guess what? It still insists the tag content is too short. Tells me there are x number of anchor tags without titles. Checked them all, could not find any errors. Seobility cannot identify which anchor tags do not have title tags. Nope, there are just too many shortcomings with this online tester.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best SEO Audit tool
description: Overall experience has been wonderful. It has everything that's needed for website seo audit.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Gives detailed information about the entire website such as on-page seo, backlinks, site performance, social media presence and ways to improve the website content and its quality.
cons: Can't think of any cons because the site audit is detailed and gives all the required information.

review_title: Seobility
description: I am very satisfied with the product and the company. They regularly include new features and information
author: Manuel P.
pros: The product has a straightforward UI. It has three sections: Technical & Meta, Structure, and Content. In each section, you can find things to get better SEO and learn a lot about how SEO works and common mistakes. The information offered will be impossible to find if done manually.
cons: Possibly price, since I'm a one-person blogger.

review_title: Touch Of Glass Prints Review - Seobility
description: I use Seobility daily for my site Touch Of Glass Prints and it has helped me get 8 out of 10 keywords in the top ten with 2 at number 1 and another at position 2 in search.
author: Stuart St C.
pros: I love the easy no nonsense rank tracking of keywords and the ease of use in finding on page problems is without a doubt the best I have used.
cons: minor niggle if i have to be picky is sometimes the bold tags or missing tags can be awkward to fix, states have these problems but when checked are not always present.

review_title: seobility all in one best seo software
description: it is extraordinary all in one Seo software that helps me to make more audit reports in less pricing and fasting way
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very quick and easy to use we just need to attach with our website and its crawler audit our site in just couple of seconds, It helps in my business to find more aduti reports of other website in a single click
cons: in free version just one project is to be create but helpful for beginner to try it out
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: One of the best SEO tools
author: Jimmy I.
pros: - powerful free tool - Fairly priced tool with extra funcionality - Fast - Easy to use
cons: I reallly needed to think long about this and i can't think of any.

review_title: Business that cares about your business
description: Seobility helped to keep an eye on ranking and to track performance compared to the competition
author: Badari G.
pros: Easy to use solution for inexperienced in SEO. During the difficult times caused by the pandemic the company even offered free period for premium members.
cons: Some features are harder to find compared to competition

review_title: My Experience
description: So far I honestly love it. I deleted the others. This helps me because it is consice and simple to see whats going on with my SEO.
author: Krystle P.
pros: I like the alerts and the breakdown of all of my relevant data. The won and lost rankings especially.
cons: There could be a few more metrics to watch and mesaure in the snapshot sent via email. Eg. Who has the #1 spot if i was replaced

review_title: Sehr gutes Tool im Low End Bereich
description: Ich nutze Seobility meist für die Erstanalayse von Neukunden. Man kann super Chancen und Schwächen aufzeigen und man auch super das ganze SEO Thema erklären. Leider ist bei meinen Mini Kunden dann meist schon der Geldbeutel leer.... manchmal lässt sich dann einer auf einen befristeten Zeitraum ein. Seit Corona sind aber eh die Hälfte meiner Yoga-Studios und Maultaschen Verkäufer eingegangen und der Rest wird vermutlich nach Einführung der impf Pflicht aufgeben. Von daher ist meine Opinion wohl nicht besonders gewichtig. Mein Eindruck ist sehr positiv und ich wünschte, ich könnte mehr mit Seobility arbdeiten.
author: Ursula F.
pros: Ich mag: Übersichtlichkeit, Einfach zu bedienen und zu verstehen, die wichtigsten Features sind gegeben, es ist NICHT teuer, es ist sympartisch, wenn man eine Frage hat bekommt man freundliche und kompetente Antwort
cons: schwierig. Manchmal verstehe ich Meldungen nicht ganz (z.B. wenn irgendwelche nicht aufindbare tote Links mokiert werden) Eigentlich wenig zu meckern. Vielleicht dieses: Ich bin so eine kleine One-man-show mit ebenso kleinen one-man-show Kunden, dass sich ein Abonnement nicht lohnt. Obwohl mir natürlich klar ist, dass der Preis wirklich ok ist. Es liegt einfach bei mir an der Kundenstruktur. Manchmal mache ich ein Probeabo oder nehme ein Angeobt an. Habt Ihr eigentlich auch so "3 - Monats Abos"? Das wäre für Mini-Kunden manchmal schon hilfreich. Einfach ein vorher nachher zu sehen, einen uplift

review_title: Review from e-architect.com
description: Consistently good functioning and customer services
author: Adrian W.
pros: I can barely fault this product, the intelligence of the system is stunning, and the layout with so many grouped subsets allows the user to pick and choose per designated priorities. This allows for methodical implementation of revisions.
cons: Some parameters could be tweaked in my view:- 1. Problems with external links - almost all the remaining faults are false positives, create by typically flash pages and pop-ups, it looks like we have 71 errors here but in fact have 0 2. Identical anchor text - we have logically many similar pages, for example and architecture tour page for Berlin is similar to one for Frankfurt, there is a logic to balance between unique and brand consistency, we have masses of pages noted as errors yet no way to resolve logically

review_title: SEObility Is One Of The Best Tool To Fix Issues On My Website.
description: Support was best, the product itself is fast and brings everything to the table. I saw all the mistakes on my website and get all the mistakes fixed.
author: Daljit S.
pros: This tool has shown me those issues, which other tools were not showing at all. I loved it so much. I used it for 6 months and I can say it clearly that there is no other tool like it.
cons: I never found any issue on this website or the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ron Dayley Realtor - Coldwell Banker CM&H
description: I've taken my website that wasn't ranking on the 1st or 2nd page to having most of my key search phrases showing up on the 1st page now.
author: Ronald D.
pros: I really like the ease of use. I would recommend it to everyone.
cons: I can't think of any cons. Everything works like it should.

review_title: One of the best SEO tools
author: Mohit Y.
pros: We can easily crawl whole website and fix our seo related issues
cons: Lots of features and easy to use for me
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good monitoring
author: Craig M.
pros: The ease of use in allowing me to track the SEO and web op of my sites
cons: Nothing really, other than the limit on free searching

review_title: numero 1
author: Jose S.
pros: Análise da página, página analise, tradução e ortugrafia baixa
cons: É eficaz, simples e útil facil de usar muito

review_title: Great SEO software!
author: Sheri P.
pros: This is a simple, quick, and easy way to jump into SEO or run a quick report for a prospective or current client to help them understand where they stand.
cons: There are some complexities that I have yet to master, but I suspect it should be easy enough when I need those.

review_title: Best Free SEO Tool
author: Hunter S.
pros: I especially liked that it was very cheap and provided all the technical issues.
cons: Ended up switching because couldn't see enough about backlinks or competitors, but for the price, it was great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An excellent peice of software if you get to know it
description: Very good. I was using SEObility as part of a SEO campaign for a client for a couple of years and would have no trouble recommending it to tackle essential areas of website maintenance
author: Jacob L.
pros: Simple to use with a little bit of learning. Lots of insight and some easy, actionable pointers to inrease the health of any SEO campaign
cons: A little expensive for what it does perhaps

review_title: Many functions but a little complicated
description: The backlink checker was my main reason for using the software to discover where competitors are linking.
author: James W.
pros: SEO Checker, Backlink Checker,Keyword Checker
cons: It would be good to have simplier configuration processses.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Seobility is our goto tool
description: Seobility helped us to identify problems with sitemaps, internal linking and the structure of sites. It's easy to say that it is our number one tool when new customers with SEO problems are requesting our help since it's really easy to setup and get an initial overview of the current situation that is going on.
author: Fabian G.
pros: Since it's very easy and intuitive to setup new projects within the tool it is easy to say that this is one of our most useful points. The continuous monitoring and alerting gives us the ability to see nearly in realtime if changes are helpful at working as expected. It's also very comfortable to navigate through the internal linking of a website structure and to directly identify which links are coming from the site and from where everything is linked.
cons: An option to automatically trigger a new Website scan e.g. when a new article on a website has been published would be a pretty neat feature to have in place.

review_title: Essential SEO software for your toolkit.
description: It allows me to do my own technical SEO without being scammed.
author: John W.
pros: For me, the best tools are the site audit and TF *IDF tools. The audit tool goes very deep covering Tech and meta, Structure and content. It's like a swiss army knife with other things it can do including Keyword checker, Keyword research and SERP snippet generator to name a few.
cons: There are no cons that I can see, site audits are essential and should be done regularly.

review_title: Useful SEO Crawler For Small Website
description: SEO is a huge function in understanding and evaluate for the organic growth of a company. I have been in the SEO field for a long time and always love tools like SEObility which helps you detect technical errors on the platform that are humanly impossible to detect. SEObility solves this problem in an efficient method. If you are planning for a white-hat SEO growth you can go for this tool.
author: Nirav S.
pros: SEObility helps you identify and categorize errors as technical issues or content issues. Reporting of errors on the platform is done in a systematic way. Also, they provide an exhaustive list of errors to solve and help you achieve organic traffic growth.
cons: SEObility at times shows fake alerts for the errors. Also, a lot of errors detected are irrelevant to solve.

review_title: A Cost Efficient SEO Solution
author: James N.
pros: Seobility offers what other competing services don't. An SEO Solution for blogs and individuals for whom it doesn't make sense to pay close to 100 dollars a month. A baseline subscription is a no frills solution that does what it needs to do.
cons: Manually or individually refreshing keyword placement is hit and miss, and often timeouts.
